notes: Go Vegas revenue slice — outreach pipeline v1 already shipped as code; this queue closes the last mile to live revenue: scheduler tick (daily discover/invite/follow-up under caps), dry-run proof script, and SENTRY-facing status receipt. No founder UI in this slice.

steps.task: Add a useful-work-guarded Go Vegas outreach scheduler that runs discover→enrich→invite→follow-up under daily caps without burning tokens when there is no work.
steps.spec: ESM module @ssot docs/products/limitlessos/PRODUCT_HOME.md. Export startGoVegasOutreachScheduler({ pool, notificationService, logger }) and getGoVegasOutreachSchedulerStatus(). Use createUsefulWorkGuard from services/useful-work-guard.js (and requireEnvVars/requireTableRows helpers if present). Prerequisites: pool present; skip hard if neither COMMAND_CENTER_KEY nor notification path can send (do not invent secrets). workCheck: COUNT go_vegas_prospects needing invite (status discovered/enriched with contact_email) OR follow-up eligible — if 0, still allow one discover tick when GO_VEGAS_ALLOW_DISCOVER_IDLE=1 else skip. execute: const outreach = createGoVegasOutreach({ pool, sendEmail, logger }); then in order outreach.discoverBusinesses({ count: 5 }), outreach.enrichProspects({ limit: 10 }), outreach.inviteBatch({ limit: 5 }), outreach.runFollowUpCron({}). Use EXACT method names inviteBatch + runFollowUpCron (not sendInvites). Honor getSendQuota / daily caps inside those methods. Interval from GO_VEGAS_SCHEDULER_MS default 21600000 (6h); boot delay 120000. Never log emails or secrets. Named exports only; no browser globals.
steps.note: GAP-FILL: never-stop authored broken createUsefulWorkGuard usage (invented shouldRun / export-before-import); conductor rewrote to real guard contract.

steps.task: Start the Go Vegas outreach scheduler from the founder-builder runtime composition root after outreach routes mount.
steps.spec: Additive edit only (Zone 3). Import startGoVegasOutreachScheduler from ../services/go-vegas-outreach-scheduler.js. After createGoVegasOutreachRoutes(...), call startGoVegasOutreachScheduler({ pool, notificationService, logger }) inside try/catch (non-fatal warn on failure). Do not remove existing mounts. Keep @ssot docs/products/lifeos/PRODUCT_HOME.md on this file.
steps.note: GAP-FILL: never-stop falsely marked done with unrelated SHA b6ec13c8 (Wave 0 boot report); conductor wired startGoVegasOutreachScheduler for real.

steps.task: Expose scheduler status on GET /api/v1/go-vegas/scheduler so ops can see if the revenue loop is alive.
steps.spec: Additive edit. Import getGoVegasOutreachSchedulerStatus from ../services/go-vegas-outreach-scheduler.js. Add GET /api/v1/go-vegas/scheduler behind requireKey returning { ok:true, ...getGoVegasOutreachSchedulerStatus() }. Preserve existing routes. @ssot docs/products/limitlessos/PRODUCT_HOME.md.
steps.note: GAP-FILL: endpoint live on founder runtime via createGoVegasOutreachRoutes (not auto-register). Never-stop was thrashing queue-status commits while blocked on false auto-register requirement.

steps.spec: Exports a function to get canonical product id. Returns 'LimitlessOS' or 'BusinessOS' as needed.
Exports a function to fetch audit data from supported sources: Plaid, manual intake, OAuth per vendor.
Exports registerAuditIntakeFlowRoutes(app, deps); handles route logic for audit intake flow including questions and optional system connections.
steps.last_error: route module not auto-registered — add {"path":"routes/audit-intake-flow-routes.js","register":"<registerFn>","enabled":true} to config/auto-registered-product-modules.json so the endpoint actually mounts LIVE (built + deployed but unreachable = false done)
